title: millettia macrophylla
intro: Millettia macrophylla, also known as the "big-leafed millet tree" or "kundru", is a type of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Millettia macrophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a powder for use in capsule or tablet form.
